message:
perf(storage,sync): named chunk constants, bulk dirty-id inserts, and sync import pipeline hardening

storage/sqlite.rs:
- Extract magic numbers into named constants: EXPORT_HASH_CHUNK_SIZE (900),
  DIRTY_ISSUE_CHUNK_SIZE (900), IMPORT_LABEL_CHUNK_SIZE (400),
  IMPORT_DEPENDENCY_CHUNK_SIZE (140), IMPORT_COMMENT_CHUNK_SIZE (199)
- Batch dirty_ids writes using chunked multi-row INSERT with ON CONFLICT
  instead of per-row REPLACE, reducing SQLite round-trips proportionally
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on mutate() since the function's
  length is structural (transaction stages) not accidental complexity
- Guard events and notifications writes with emptiness checks to skip
  no-op database calls inside hot mutation paths
- Batch label/dependency/comment imports using chunked INSERT queries,
  each respecting SQLite's SQLITE_MAX_VARIABLE_NUMBER limit (999)

sync/mod.rs:
- Harden JSONL import pipeline with better error context propagation
- Improve duplicate detection using HashMap-based index for O(1) lookups
  instead of sequential scans during merge operations
- Add structured logging for import statistics (created/updated/skipped)
- Improve content-hash comparison to avoid unnecessary writes when the
  source JSONL line is semantically identical to the existing record

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
